metadata.notes: Production-ready v18 FINAL. Sekhar Master is one of Telugu cinema's most prolific choreographers with 100+ films choreographed and 5 Filmfare Awards South.

name: Sekhar Vulli VJ
title: Master Choreographer and Dance Director

choreographyEssence.danceSignature: High-energy mass choreography blending Western hip-hop with Telugu folk elements, creating viral dance steps
choreographyEssence.movementPhilosophy: Power-packed energetic movements with accessible steps that audiences can replicate, focusing on mass appeal and trendability
choreographyEssence.signatureSteps: Fast-paced footwork combinations, signature hand gestures, and hook steps that become social media trends
choreographyEssence.energyLevel: High-octane, fast-paced with explosive energy bursts
choreographyEssence.innovationInDance: Pioneered viral-ready choreography in Telugu cinema, creating dance steps designed for social media replication
choreographyEssence.contributionToCinema: Elevated Telugu film choreography standards through innovative mass dance sequences and established choreography as a standalone attraction

bio: Sekhar Master (born November 7, 1980) is a celebrated Telugu film choreographer who has choreographed 100+ films since 2007. After working as background dancer for six years and assistant for eight years under Rakesh Master, he debuted with Mantra (2007). Known for viral mass choreography in hits like Ramuloo Ramulaa (Ala Vaikunthapurramuloo), Saami Saami (Pushpa), and Vachinde (Fidaa), his energetic Western-folk fusion style dominates Telugu cinema. Winner of five Filmfare Awards South and Nandi Award, he's also popular as Dhee TV judge.

institutions: Crash course at Vijayawada dance institute

influenceAndLegacy.danceRevolution: Revolutionized Telugu cinema choreography by pioneering viral-ready dance steps designed for social media replication while maintaining cinematic grandeur
influenceAndLegacy.movementStandards: Elevated choreography standards by making dance a standalone attraction and establishing choreographers as key creative contributors to film success
influencedChoreographers: Younger generation of choreographers adopting social media-friendly choreography approach
influenceAndLegacy.trendSetter: Created the template for mass choreography in Telugu cinema with perfect balance of energy, accessibility, and viral potential
influenceAndLegacy.industryRespect: Regarded as one of the most bankable choreographers in Telugu cinema, with top stars specifically requesting his choreography for mass songs
influenceAndLegacy.legacy: Pioneer of viral choreography culture in Telugu cinema, with songs like Ramuloo Ramulaa and Saami Saami becoming cultural phenomena transcending regional boundaries

instagram.danceContent: Regularly posts behind-the-scenes choreography videos, dance rehearsals, trending dance challenges, and interactions with fans

youtube.danceVideos: Posts choreography rehearsal versions and dance tutorials

quotes.quote: Dance choreography today needs to work both on big screen and small mobile screens. Every step should be memorable and repeatable.
Working with Allu Arjun is a choreographer's dream - his precision and energy bring choreography to life.
quotes.context: Interview about collaboration with Allu Arjun

trivia: Worked as background dancer for 6 years and assistant choreographer for 8 years before debuting as independent choreographer in 2007
Won 5 Filmfare Awards South for Best Choreography - one of the most awarded choreographers in South Indian cinema
Popular judge on Telugu dance reality show Dhee (seasons 7-13) on ETV, becoming household name beyond film choreography
Choreographed Megastar Chiranjeevi's comeback film Khaidi No. 150, creating age-appropriate yet energetic mass steps
His choreography for Ramuloo Ramulaa became one of the most viral Telugu songs globally with 500M+ social media recreations
Collaborates frequently with music directors Devi Sri Prasad and Thaman S for chartbuster songs
First Telugu choreographer to consciously design choreography for social media virality while maintaining cinematic appeal
Choreographed 100+ Telugu films across 18-year career, averaging 25-30 songs per year during peak period
Expanded to Tamil and Kannada cinema, choreographing Thalapathy Vijay's The Greatest of All Time (2024)
Instagram following of 2.5M makes him one of the most followed choreographers in Indian cinema
knownFor: 5 Filmfare Awards South for Best Choreography - among most awarded choreographers
Viral mass choreography pioneer - Ramuloo Ramulaa, Saami Saami with 500M+ social media recreations
Signature high-energy Western-folk fusion dance style with hook steps
Long-term collaboration with Allu Arjun, Ram Charan, Jr NTR, Chiranjeevi for iconic songs
Popular Dhee reality show judge on ETV (2014-2023) - household name beyond films
Created age-appropriate mass choreography for Chiranjeevi's comeback in Khaidi No. 150
Elevated choreography to standalone attraction with social media-ready viral steps
Nandi Award winner and 8+ major choreography awards recipient
2.5M Instagram followers - one of most followed Indian choreographers
